purpose: Playbooks for the five task types considered in the Reonic PoC. These records help the sales assistant choose and prepare a next best action without hardcoding a single demo path.
global_guardrails: Respect consent and opt-out before recommending a channel.
Every task should have a purpose, proof asset, and debrief question.
Do not use artificial urgency, fabricated social proof, guaranteed payback, or unsupported finance/subsidy/timeline claims.
